title: CashCTSTimeEnum
description: Details the day on which cash collateral is required to be transferred relative to the Notification Time.

oneOf.title: FirstLBD
oneOf.description: The cash collateral should be transferred on the first local business day.

oneOf.title: Next
oneOf.description: The cash collateral should be transferred on the next day.

oneOf.title: Same
oneOf.description: The cash collateral should be transferred on the same day.

oneOf.title: SecondLBD
oneOf.description: The cash collateral should be transferred on the second local business day.
